description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular design and a matte black finish. The frame features a dark brown grip panel with visible fasteners, likely made of wood or a wood-textured polymer, providing ergonomic support for the hand. The slide is squared and features serrations at the rear for improved handling, as well as small red-dot sights at both the front and rear for aiming. The trigger guard is large and slightly squared, offering ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The barrel is standard length, flush with the slide, and the muzzle is clean with no visible threading or compensator. Overall, the handgun exhibits a utilitarian yet refined appearance, suitable for law enforcement or civilian self-defense scenarios.
description: A modern, angular semi-automatic handgun with a matte black slide, brown ergonomic grip, and red-dot sights. The design is robust and functional, with visible fasteners and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, brown grip panel, slide serrations, and red-dot sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the twin slides, sight alignment, and the slim profile of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip panel, slide details, and overall symmetry of the handgun.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle openings, front sights, and the squared-off slide ends.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular with a dark brown coloration, likely simulating wood or a textured polymer, and is secured with visible metallic fasteners. Its surface appears smooth with subtle contouring for ergonomic comfort, lacking aggressive checkering or stippling but shaped to fit the palm securely. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, squared-off, and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. It is thick and solid, with no visible undercuts or integrated accessories, and lacks additional texturing or reinforcement beyond its angular, functional design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded profile with no compensators or external features. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are subtle, engraved markings on the slide, including what appears to be a serial number or model designation near the ejection port and faint manufacturer text along the side. These markings are small, unobtrusive, and blend into the matte black finish, with no prominent logos or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a slight bevel for easier insertion and removal. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the design is minimalistic, focusing on function over embellishment.
